entries.en-US: # /rules-distill — Distill Principles from Skills into Rules
entries.zh-Hans: # /rules-distill — 从技能中提炼原则为规则

entries.en-US: Scan installed skills, extract cross-cutting principles, and distill them into rules.
entries.zh-Hans: 扫描已安装的技能，提取跨领域原则，并将其提炼为规则。

entries.en-US: Follow the full workflow defined in the `rules-distill` skill.
entries.zh-Hans: 遵循 `rules-distill` 技能中定义的完整工作流程。
